titleStmt.title: SII 18.63: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 63. (B.K. No. 72 of 1932-33.) HĀVANŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Durgā on the road to Guttal

summary.p: This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 975, Vijaya, Pushya śu. Trayōdaśi, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1053, December 26, Sunday. The saṁkrānti however fell on the previous Friday, the 24th December.

It states that when Maiḷaladēvi, the senior queen of Trailokyamalladēva, was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, a grant of the income derived from certain taxes was made to the temple of Kalidēvasvāmi of Mūlasthāna, built by the son (name not clear) of Mūkagāvuṇḍa. The donors were pergaḍe Bāchimayya, pergaḍe Jakkimayya and Daṇḍanāyaka Vāmadēva, the officer in charge of the bilkoḍe tax. The donations were made by them at the instance of Śivarāja, the pergaḍe of pannāya and vaḍḍarāvuḷa taxes, Vāvanayyā, the pergaḍe of the perjuṅka tax of Banavāsi Twelvethousand and a Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara name lost respectively. The gift was entrusted to Chillukāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svastyanavaratapa
ramakalyāṇābhyudayasahaśraphaḷabhōgabhāgi
ni dvitīyalakṣmīnivāseyar savatimadabhaṁjane śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvararddhāṁgane śrīman piri
yarasi maiḷaladēviyar banavāsipanniccāsiramu
maṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . sakavarṣa
975 neya vijayasaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha trayō
dasi Ādityavāra vuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu sa
mastaguṇasaṁpannaṁ kūṭakoḷgaṇḍanenisida śrīmatkāja
vurada mūkagāvuṇḍana magaṁ sōmēśvaradāsiyenisida
maṁ māḍisida dēgulada mūlasthānada kalidēva
svāmige . samastarājyabharabhāranirūpita mahāmā
tyapadavīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsā
haśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa śrīmatpannāyada vaḍḍarā
vuḷada perggaḍe śivarājana besade perggeḍe bācimayyanuṁ
samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātya padavīvirāja
māna mānōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannara
ppa śrīmatbanavāsipannirccāsirada perjjuṁkada perggaḍe vā(ṁ)va
ṇayyaṁgaḷa besade perggaḍe jakkimayyanuṁ . samadhi
gatapaṁcamahāśabda maṇṇaḷēśvaraṁ śrīmatkī
vana besade bilkaḍeya suṁkādhipatiyenisida daṇḍa
ka vāmadēvanuṁ Aṁtu mūvaruṁ yamaniya(ṁ)masvādhyā
dhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamūdhisaṁpannarappa
śrīmaccillukācāryyara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakadiṁ mū
ṟuṁ suṁkamumaṁ biṭṭu gātradoḷuṁ pēṟaṁ koṭṭar .
Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
ge Argghyatīrtthaveṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sahasra
kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnoḷkaṭṭisi caturvvēdapā
ragarappa brāhmaṇarge Ubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku .
Ī dharmmamanaḷidavanā tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā kavileyumanā brāhma
ṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundhārā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
